description: The Porsche Boxster, produced since 1996, is the mid-engined roadster that saved Porsche from bankruptcy. Across four generations (986, 987, 981, 718), it evolved from a 2.5-litre flat-six to include turbocharged four-cylinder and naturally aspirated 4.0-litre flat-six engines. The Boxster Spyder and 718 Spyder RS with the GT4 engine are the most collectible.
